title: Sorry for the late night ping @everyone
text:
Sorry for the late night ping @everyone

But I'm going to be putting up a poll below as requested by the TO's for the 🛞 May 16th Slab Sharks x ETB Lorcana 5K Mystery Wheel Tournament.
author: Ryan Fan

title: @everyone
text:
@everyone

This is your weekly reminder of the THREE  big upcoming events in May.  Click each link for full details.

❄️  May 2nd [GTA Lorcana League Winterspell Season Championship](https://discord.com/channels/1253915141716578314/1256090387978784778/1494460273912840534)

🎟️ Registration
https://enterthebattlefield.ca/collections/events/products/gta-lorcana-league-winterspell-season-championship-may-2nd

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
🛞 May 16th [Slab Sharks x ETB Lorcana 5K Mystery Wheel Tournament](https://discord.com/channels/1253915141716578314/1256090387978784778/1494460273912840534)

🎟️ Registration
https://enterthebattlefield.ca/collections/events/products/slab-sharks-x-etb-lorcana-5k-mystery-wheel-tournament
https://tcg.ravensburgerplay.com/events/504878

THE FIRST 60 PAID (must pay on website link above) will be entered into a mystery pack draw where you will randomly select an alien (pictured below) and get the corresponding prize associated to the number. You also get to keep the Alien figure.

Mystery Pack Prizes you will get 1 of the below:
1x <:rarity_enchanted_active:1496177955699818716> Diablo - Devoted Herald - 3 Available
1x <:rarity_challenge_active:1496177890922860734> Maleficent - Monstrous Dragon - 1 Available
1x <:rarity_legendary_active:1496178002592272404> Dumbo - Ninth Wonder of the Universe - 2 Available
1x <:rarity_enchanted_active:1496177955699818716> Look at this Family - 1 Available
1x <:rarity_enchanted_active:1496177955699818716> Negaduck - Public Enemy Number One- 1 Available
1x <:rarity_epic_active:1496177974704210100> Granmother Willow - Ancient Advisor - 4 Available
1x  Wilds Unknown booster pack- 48 Available

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

🏆  May 30th - 31st [Enter The Battlefield Lorcana Infinity 15k CCQ](https://discord.com/channels/1253915141716578314/1256090387978784778/1463967645715009618)

🎟️ Registration
https://www.eventbrite.ca/e/enter-the-battlefield-lorcana-infinity-15k-ccq-tickets-1980757254268
author: GTA Lorcana

title: @everyone
text:
@everyone 
📣 GTA Lorcana —Event Announcement

❄️ Slab Sharks x ETB Lorcana 5K Mystery Wheel Tournament
After a successful event last set, Slab Sharks x ETB are hosting another Mystery Wheel Tournament.  More prizes, more spinning!

📆 Event Details
Date: May 16, 2026 — 11:30 AM
Venue: Enter The Battlefield Oakville, 2172 Speers Rd, Oakville, ON
Format: Infinity Constructed | Swiss + Top 8 Cut | $5,000 Prize on the wheel

💵 Entry & Prizing
Entry is $65 + tax, with prizing on the wheel

🎟️ Registration
https://enterthebattlefield.ca/collections/events/products/slab-sharks-x-etb-lorcana-5k-mystery-wheel-tournament

🧑‍🤝‍🧑 Spread the Word
Feel free to share this post with anyone who might be interested!
author: GTA Lorcana

title: @everyone
text:
@everyone 
📣 GTA Lorcana —Event Announcement

❄️ Season Championship — Open to Everyone
We're approaching the end of the Winterspell season, and this time we're opening the End of Set Championship to the full community instead of limiting it to our top 32. It's a new direction for us, and we're looking forward to seeing how it goes.

📆 Event Details
Date: May 2, 2026 — 11:00 AM
Venue: Enter The Battlefield Oakville, 2172 Speers Rd, Oakville, ON
Format: Core Constructed | Swiss + Top 8 Cut | $2,000 Guaranteed

💵 Entry & Prizing
Entry is $50 + tax, with prizing in store credit. Top 8 pays out $100–$800.
Leaderboard players (Top 32) pay in-store on the day and earn $0.50 off per season point.

🎟️ Registration
https://enterthebattlefield.ca/collections/events/products/gta-lorcana-league-winterspell-season-championship-may-2nd

🧑‍🤝‍🧑 Spread the Word
Winterspell Season Championship is open to the full community this season — feel free to share this post with anyone who might be interested.

Questions or feedback? Drop them in <#1346159732490240020>.
author: GTA Lorcana

title: @everyone
text:
@everyone
📣 GTA Lorcana — Server Update

A few things to share:

🎟️ ETB Lorcana Infinity $15K CCQ
Registration is open for the Enter the Battlefield CCQ on May 30th to 31st — 256 players, $15,000 in prizes. If you haven't signed up yet, now's the time:
https://www.eventbrite.ca/e/enter-the-battlefield-lorcana-infinity-15k-ccq-tickets-1980757254268

🛒 ETB Community Discount — Now Automated
The Google Form is gone. You can now apply for the Enter the Battlefield community discount directly in Discord:
/etb-discount rph_username:YourUsername email:you@example.com
See <#1255205802944233483> for eligibility and instructions.
If you were previously approved via the form, run the command anyway to confirm your account is linked — it'll let you know if you're already good to go.

🏆 Set Championships
Set Champs are now posted automatically in <#1422319248218525727> — updated daily at 7:00 AM ET. Events run April 4–26. No more Google Sheets.

📊 Community Poll
The admin team is still going through the poll results from earlier this month — we haven't forgotten. More to come.  Season end date and invitational date to be confirmed.

Questions or feedback? Drop them in <#1346159732490240020>.
author: GTA Lorcana

title: @everyone
text:
@everyone 

📣 GTA Lorcana — Server Update

A few things have been cooking behind the scenes. Here's what's new:

🌐 Website Rework
Fully rebuilt — cleaner, faster, more useful. Check it out at [gtalorcana.ca](https://gtalorcana.ca/) and share with people in your community!

⭐ Roles
We now have a rarity-based role system reflecting your league achievements, assigned automatically based on your results. See <#1483899917616550080> for the full breakdown and to make sure your account is linked correctly.

🤖 Bot Updates
The GTA Lorcana Bot has been running quietly — here's what it actually does:
<#1479988278164852746> — automatically updated with active local stores and stores that need our support
<#1253943193519784028> — standings pulled and logged automatically after events
<#1422319248218525727> — auto-populated starting two weeks before set champs season
<#1481489441746059395> (beta) — monitors events for open spots. Get notified when space opens up in a watched event (yes, this means you, Montreal CCQ)
Full automation means less room for manual corrections — results should be submitted correctly at your local store. If something looks wrong, message Ryan.

💜 Server Boosts
We're at Level 1. Five more boosts gets us to Level 2, which would unlock custom role icons — the actual Lorcana rarity symbols on your roles. I already contribute 2 boosts myself. If you've been thinking about it, now's a great time.

💬 Feedback
Have ideas? City roles? Something broken? Something you'd like to see? Drop it in <#1346159732490240020> or use the anonymous form linked there.
author: GTA Lorcana
